name: Defang
description: AI DevOps agent that deploys Docker Compose apps to AWS, GCP, or DigitalOcean with auto-managed networking, SSL, and storage.

seo.title: Defang — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Defang: AI DevOps agent that deploys Docker Compose apps to AWS, GCP, or DigitalOcean with auto-managed networking, SSL, and storage.

when_to_use: Deploy Docker Compose apps to AWS with one command
AI-assisted infrastructure provisioning for GCP and DO
Auto-managed SSL, networking, and persistent storage
Eliminate Terraform boilerplate for small team deploys

pros: Turns a Docker Compose file into multi-cloud deploys
Sets up SSL, DNS, networking automatically
AI-assisted config generation is genuinely useful
cons: Abstraction leaks when you need custom IAM or VPC
Young project, limited production track record
review.verdict: A fast path from Compose to cloud; promising but not yet a replacement for real IaC.
review.best_for: Solo devs and small teams shipping Compose apps to AWS/GCP without learning Terraform.
review.not_for: Teams with strict IaC, compliance, or complex networking requirements.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
